name: Baked Honey Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Slice off the stem ends of the tomatoes and carefully scrape out the seeds.
3. Place the open side up in a buttered baking dish.
4. Mix together the breadcrumbs, salt, pepper, and tarragon.
5. Drizzle honey over the tomatoes, rubbing it into the cavities.
6. Sprinkle the crumb mixture evenly over the tomatoes and dot with butter.
7. Bake uncovered for 30 minutes, or until the tomato skins begin to wrinkle.
8. Place under the broiler for an additional 5 minutes, or until the crumbs begin to brown.
9. Serve hot or at room temperature.
